"'''Snow Job'''" is a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] Adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]. It was written by [[Daniel Kaufman]] and illustrated by [[Matt Hatton|Matthew Hatton]].
